name: Ahmad al-Sharaa
role: Transitional President of Syria; former HTS leader (Abu Mohammed al-Jolani)
quote: Syria belongs to all Syrians — Muslims, Christians, Druze, Kurds, and Arabs. We will build a state of institutions, law, and justice for everyone.

name: Mohammed al-Bashir
role: Prime Minister, Syrian Transitional Government (Jan 2025–)
quote: Our priority is restoring basic services, reintegrating displaced Syrians, and building a functional state. We ask the international community to lift sanctions and support our people.

name: Bashar al-Assad
role: Deposed President of Syria (2000–2024); in exile in Russia
quote: Syria is facing a war of terrorism supported from abroad. We will protect the Syrian people regardless of the sacrifices required. [2013]

name: Mazloum Abdi (Ferhat Abdi Şahin)
role: Commander-in-Chief, Syrian Democratic Forces (SDF); co-chair, AANES military council
quote: We defeated ISIS on behalf of the world and we are still guarding 60,000 ISIS prisoners. We will not surrender our weapons to anyone who does not guarantee our security and rights.

name: Ilham Ahmed
role: Co-President, Syrian Democratic Council (SDC); principal Kurdish political representative
quote: We are ready to negotiate the future of northeast Syria with Damascus on the basis of decentralization and equal citizenship — but no surrender to centralized rule that ignores Kurdish rights.

name: Recep Tayyip Erdoğan
role: President of Turkey; key external power broker in Syrian conflict
quote: Turkey will not allow a terrorist corridor on its border with Syria. The YPG and PKK are the same organization and pose an existential threat to Turkish security.

name: Hakan Fidan
role: Turkish Foreign Minister; key architect of Turkey's Syria policy
quote: Turkey is committed to Syria's territorial integrity and wants a political solution that ensures security for all Syrians — but this cannot include PKK/YPG structures in the new Syria.

name: Benjamin Netanyahu
role: Prime Minister of Israel; oversees policy on Syria and Golan Heights
quote: We will not allow the establishment of a terrorist state on our border. Israel has acted and will continue to act to prevent sophisticated weapons from reaching those who threaten us.

name: Israel Katz
role: Israeli Defense Minister; oversees military operations in Syria after regime collapse
quote: Israel destroyed Syria's strategic military capabilities within days of Assad's fall to prevent them from falling into terrorist hands. This was a necessary defensive operation.

name: Geir Pedersen
role: UN Special Envoy for Syria (since 2018); leads UN-facilitated political process
quote: The United Nations is committed to supporting Syria's inclusive political transition. Security Council unity remains essential — without it, sustainable peace is impossible. [2025]

name: Volker Türk
role: UN High Commissioner for Human Rights; overseeing accountability documentation in Syria
quote: The scale of human rights violations in Syria over 13 years — systematic torture, chemical weapons, starvation sieges — demands genuine accountability. Justice is not negotiable for victims.

name: Filippo Grandi
role: UN High Commissioner for Refugees (UNHCR); manages 5.5 million Syrian refugee situation
quote: Refugees must be able to return to Syria voluntarily, safely, and with dignity. We welcome the changed situation but conditions must be right — it is too early to declare Syria safe for all refugees.

name: Ali Khamenei
role: Supreme Leader of Iran; principal backer of Assad regime 2013–2024
quote: The resistance axis has faced a setback in Syria, but the Islamic Republic's strategic project in the region is not defeated. Enemies may celebrate but history is long. [January 2025]

name: Hassan Nasrallah (d. September 2024)
role: Secretary-General of Hezbollah (2011–2024); killed in Israeli airstrike before Assad's fall
quote: We fight in Syria because Syria is the backbone of the resistance. Allowing Syria to fall would be a historic defeat for the entire resistance against Israel and imperialism. [2013]

name: Vladimir Putin
role: President of Russia; deployed military to Syria 2015; granted Assad asylum December 2024
quote: Russia's operation in Syria was not in vain. We protected a sovereign state from terrorism and secured Russia's military presence in the Mediterranean. Assad has been granted humanitarian asylum.

name: Antony Blinken
role: US Secretary of State (2021–2025); managed US Syria policy during transition
quote: Assad's fall is a historic moment. The US will support a Syrian-led process that is inclusive of all communities and guards against extremism. We will work to ease sanctions step by step. [December 2024]

name: Sultan Pasha al-Atrash (historical)
role: Druze leader; commander of the Great Syrian Revolt against French Mandate (1925–1927)
quote: To arms, O Arabs of Syria! Let us defend our country from the occupation forces and show the world that Arabs will not accept slavery. [1925]

name: Queen Zenobia (historical, c. 240–274 CE)
role: Ruler of Palmyra; created the Palmyrene Empire challenging Roman authority (270–273 CE)
quote: I demand to be treated as the queen I am, not as a prisoner. I have learned to defeat enemies, not to beg from them. [reported by Historia Augusta upon capture]

name: Hafez al-Assad (d. 2000)
role: President of Syria (1971–2000); architect of the Assad security state
quote: The state is strong not when it is generous but when it enforces discipline. The unity of Syria requires that no force — not a tribe, a sect, nor a foreign power — believes it can challenge the state. [paraphrased]

name: Saladin (Salah al-Din, historical, 1137–1193)
role: Sultan of Egypt and Syria; founder of Ayyubid dynasty; recaptured Jerusalem from Crusaders (1187)
quote: Take care of the Sunni, protect the merchants and farmers. A king who allows his subjects to be oppressed has no kingdom worth keeping. [attributed in biographer Baha ad-Din ibn Shaddad]
